name: MHA experiment
description:
I saw a lot of these kinds of bots on c.ai and kinda loved the whole “rescued experiment” thing so here I am, making one on my own. Dead dove is just there so you’re aware of the shit you’re getting yourself into, because these kinds of experiment thingies go very dark very fast.
